report_name: TCS Launches Sovereign Cloud in EU to Address AI Data Security and Sovereignty Rules

identities.name: Tata Consultancy Services
identities.description: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) launched the SovereignSecure Cloud service in the European Union to help organizations adopt AI and cloud technologies while adhering to data sovereignty regulations like GDPR.

identities.name: Sapthagiri Chapalapalli
identities.description: Head of Europe at TCS, quoted in the article regarding the need for organizations to balance supply chain and sovereignty risks with leveraging new technologies.
